hero.headline:
Reliable Roads.
Reliable Reach.
hero.subheadline: Stop getting stuck at the gate. From Johannesburg to the Copperbelt, Apex manages the full chain: customs, bonded transit, and 24/7 road-monitoring. We don't just quote—we deliver.
hero.alt: Freight truck crossing border, golden hour, dust trail.

servicesSection.label: Our Field Ops
servicesSection.heading: Corridor-Ready Logistics
servicesSection.intro: We don't work from behind a screen; we work from the border post. We know the North-South Corridor like the back of our hands.

border-docs.title: Border-Ready Paperwork
border-docs.description: Don't let a missing stamp stop your truck. We handle ZIMRA, ZRA, and SARS documentation before your wheels even hit the gate.
border-docs.keyBenefit: No 'missing docs' dramas at the border.

customs-clearance.title: Boots-on-the-Ground Customs
customs-clearance.description: We don't just file papers; our agents are at the gate in Beit Bridge, Chirundu, and Kasumbalesa to push your load through the queue.
customs-clearance.keyBenefit: Agents at the gate, not just the office.

route-planning.title: Corridor Strategy
route-planning.description: We monitor strikes, road closures, and border congestion. We re-route in real-time so your load doesn't sit idle for days.

transporter-network.title: Vetted Fleet Network
transporter-network.description: No 'rogue' operators. We only use verified, SADC-compliant transporters who know how to handle high-value or bulk commodities.

real-time-monitoring.title: Live Status Updates
real-time-monitoring.description: Get direct WhatsApp updates. We track your load via GPS and keep you informed of every checkpoint along the way.
real-time-monitoring.keyBenefit: Total visibility from A to Z.

direct-communication.title: Real People, Real Talk
direct-communication.description: No call centers, no ticket systems. You're talking directly to our South Africa-based dispatch team. If there's a problem, we fix it fast.

process.label: The Process
process.heading: How Apex Works
process.body: Simple for you. Handled by us. Every step of the cross‑border journey is managed end‑to‑end.
process.cardBody: From the moment you contact us to final delivery, we manage every detail — paperwork, routing, border clearance, monitoring. No handoffs. No excuses.
process.alt: Logistics operations – Apex team coordinating freight at a border crossing.
steps: You Have Cargo — Tell us what needs to move, where it's coming from, and where it's going. We handle the rest.
We Find the Truck — We match your load to a verified transporter from our network — the right vehicle, right capacity, right route.
Docs & Border Prep — All border documentation and customs processes are prepared and submitted before the truck even arrives at the gate.
We Monitor Every KM — Real‑time involvement from our team throughout the journey. You get updates. We manage exceptions instantly.
Safe Delivery — Your cargo arrives at destination, on time, with full documentation. No excuses — every load must move.

coverage.label: Where We Operate
coverage.heading: Africa Coverage
coverage.sub: Cross-border freight across Southern and Central Africa. Every border, every document — managed by us.

values.label: Our Principles
values.heading:
Built on
Reliability
principles: Reliability First — Every load must move — no excuses. We do not cancel, we do not delay without communication. Your cargo commitment is our commitment.
Hands-On Operations — We are actively involved in every shipment. Real people, real‑time involvement — not a platform that passes you to a stranger.
Strong Network — Years of building relationships with trusted transporters across the region means we always have the right connection for your load.
Speed & Tech — Digital documentation, rapid processing, and tech‑enabled tracking mean your freight moves faster with less friction at every stage.

techBanner.heading:
Documentation.
Done Fast.
techBanner.body: Cross‑border freight lives and dies on paperwork. Apex uses digital workflows to prepare, submit, and verify all documentation before your truck reaches the border — cutting clearance time dramatically and eliminating common delay points.

contactCta.label: Get In Touch
contactCta.heading: Ready to Move?
contactCta.body: Call or WhatsApp us directly — we're based in South Africa and respond fast. No forms needed if you'd rather talk.

hero.heading: Full-Chain Freight Services
hero.sub: From border docs to final delivery – we own the entire cross‑border process.
hero.alt: Apex truck fleet lined up, ready for cross‑border dispatch.

serviceList.title: Border Documentation
serviceList.description: Fast, accurate preparation of all cross-border paperwork. We know the requirements for all 8 Southern & Central African countries — no delays at the gate.

serviceList.title: Customs Clearance
serviceList.description: We navigate customs processes with precision. Our team handles declarations, duties, and compliance so your load never sits at a border unnecessarily.
serviceList.keyBenefit: On‑ground agents at every major border.

serviceList.title: Route Planning
serviceList.description: Strategic routing that balances speed, cost, and compliance. We factor in road conditions, border wait times, and cargo requirements before a wheel turns.
serviceList.keyBenefit: Real‑time adjustments for weather, strikes, or wait times.

serviceList.title: Transporter Network
serviceList.description: Your cargo, matched to the right truck. We maintain a strong network of verified transporters across the region, so we always have capacity when you need it.

serviceList.title: Real-Time Monitoring
serviceList.description: Hands‑on oversight from pickup to delivery. We track every shipment in real‑time and proactively handle exceptions before they become problems.

serviceList.title: Direct Communication
serviceList.description: Call or WhatsApp us any time. We are South Africa‑based and fully reachable — not an automated system, real people who know your load.

cta.heading: Not sure which service fits?
cta.sub: Tell us your load, route, and timeline. We'll build a solution.

whatIs.heading:
Paperwork.
Permits. Compliance.
whatIs.body: Every cross-border load crosses at least two customs jurisdictions. One missing document, one wrong HS code, one unpaid duty — and your truck sits at the gate. Border clearance is the full chain: export docs, import permits, transit bonds, duty payments, and physical release. Most shippers get it wrong once. We get it right every time.

whyApex.title: Bonded Carrier
whyApex.body: We hold bonded carrier status at every major Southern & Central African border. Your cargo moves under our bond — no delays, no extra bonds per trip.

whyApex.title: Agents on the Ground
whyApex.body: Our agents are at the gate, not in an office. They speak the local language, know the officers, and clear your paperwork before the truck arrives.

whyApex.title: Digital First
whyApex.body: ASYCUDA declarations, pre-filed docs, COMESA certs — all handled digitally. No lost forms, no last-minute surprises.

whyApex.title: 6-Hour Dispatch
whyApex.body: You WhatsApp us. We assign a truck and agent within 6 hours. No call-centre queues. No 'we'll get back to you'.

borderClearance.processSummary: We hold bonded carrier status across Beit Bridge, Kazungula, Chirundu, Kasumbalesa, Mchinji, Tlokweng, and more.
keySteps: Document Check – Verified before truck leaves yard.
Customs Lodge – ASYCUDA declarations submitted electronically.

hero.sub: Reg No: 2025/789240/07 | Head Office: Midrand, Gauteng

companyOverview.title: Company Overview
companyOverview.body:
Apex Transport Group has grown exponentially from a domestic heavy‑commodity mover into a fully‑fledged pan‑African logistics operator. We specialise in end‑to‑end movement of bulk and heavy cargo across Southern and Central Africa, connecting industry, mines, and commerce with reliable, hands‑on transport solutions.

Our model is built on one simple principle: every load must move — no excuses. Whether a shipment originates at a South African port or a remote Congolese mine, Apex takes ownership of the entire journey: finding the right truck, preparing border documentation, navigating customs, planning optimal routes, and monitoring progress in real time until safe delivery is confirmed.

list.name: Freight Brokerage
list.description: Vetted network of owner‑operators and fleet carriers handling copper cathodes, cobalt, manganese, coal, chrome, fertiliser, and general bulk goods. Rate negotiation, carrier contracting, load confirmation, dispatch, and real‑time status reporting.

list.name: International Border and Customs Management
list.description: Full administrative chain at every crossing — export/import docs, customs clearance across SA, Zimbabwe, Zambia, DRC, Malawi, Botswana, transit permits, dangerous goods declarations, liaison with border agencies.

list.name: Route Planning and Optimisation
list.description: Mapping safest, fastest, most fuel‑efficient corridors factoring in border delays, road conditions, and security. Real‑time re‑routing when issues arise.

countries.name: South Africa
countries.hubs: Durban (port), Johannesburg (warehousing), Pretoria (HQ), Witbank (coal), Steelpoort (chrome/PGMs), Richards Bay (coal terminal), Kathu (iron ore), Polokwane (northern gateway)

countries.name: DRC
countries.hubs: Katanga and Lualaba provinces — Mutanda, Tenke Fungurume, Kamoto, Ruashi, Kamoa‑Kakula, Kipushi, Kibali gold. Corridors: Lubumbashi to Kasumbalesa to Zambia, Kolwezi export, Kinshasa, Goma/Butembo.

countries.name: Zimbabwe
countries.hubs: Beit Bridge, Forbes/Mutare, Chirundu borders; Great Dyke chrome/platinum/gold; Harare and Bulawayo distribution; tobacco season logistics.

countries.name: Zambia
countries.hubs: Copperbelt (Lusaka, Ndola, Kitwe, Chingola) — key link between DRC and SA ports. Kasumbalesa border (busiest crossing).

countries.name: Malawi
countries.hubs: Blantyre and Lilongwe — agricultural exports (tobacco, tea, sugar) and mining inputs via Tete (Mozambique) and Mchinji (Zambia).

countries.name: Botswana
countries.hubs: Jwaneng/Orapa diamonds, Morupule coal, soda ash. Trans‑Kalahari corridor, Gaborone and Francistown hubs.

process.title: How It Works — The Apex Process
steps: Client Enquiry — Share load details, origin, destination, timeline.
Carrier Sourcing — Match right vehicle (flat‑deck, side‑tipper, tanker, lowbed, container).
Documentation Preparation — Export permits, customs entries, transit docs, border clearances before departure.
Dispatch and Route Briefing — Driver fully briefed on route, borders, waypoints, rest stops, emergency contacts.
Border Management — Our agents manage customs at every post to avoid delays.
Real‑Time Monitoring — GPS tracking, driver contact, regular status updates.
Delivery Confirmation — Proof of delivery collected, shipment file closed.

network.title: Network and Partnerships
partners: Vetted fleet owners across SA, Zambia, Zimbabwe
Licensed customs clearing agents at all major border posts
Mining procurement teams in DRC Copperbelt
Port authority contacts — Durban and Richards Bay
Government and regulatory connections for documentation

hero.headline:
One Truck.
Everyone's Cargo.
hero.subheadline: Share space on a truck that is already running your route — pay only for the tons you send.
hero.alt: Truck loaded with mixed cargo at a depot terminal

howItWorks.heading: How Consolidation Works
howItWorks.sub: Three simple steps. One shared truck. Lower cost for everyone.

steps.label: Drop-Off
steps.sub: Small consignments arrive at the same depot and join a shared corridor run. We aggregate them into one consolidated load.
steps.detail: Your cargo doesn't need to be at the depot at the same moment — we batch consignments as they arrive and dispatch once the truck is full enough. You can drop freight today for a truck leaving tomorrow.

steps.label: Consolidation
steps.sub: One manifest, one truck, one controlled load plan. Every shipper's portion is documented and tracked individually.
steps.detail: We maintain a single shipment file for the truck, but sub-manifest records for each shipper. You can see your portion, your cost, and your delivery confirmation — not the entire truck's manifest.

steps.label: Departure & Corridor Run
steps.sub: The truck leaves on the same network and routes already covered by Apex — no new corridors, no extra risk.
steps.detail: Because the truck is already running your corridor, you get the same route reliability, border agents, and monitoring as a dedicated truck — at a fraction of the cost.

calculator.heading: Instant Estimate
calculator.sub: Move the sliders. The truck fills in real time. Price updates live.
calculator.disclaimerBody: Prices are indicative ranges based on weight-band rates and route surcharges. The load gauge shows chargeable weight — whichever is higher of actual weight or volumetric-equivalent weight (loading metres × 1.75 t/m). Bulky low-density cargo gets priced by the space it occupies, not just its weight. For a precise quote, WhatsApp our dispatch team.

whyConsolidate.heading: Why Consolidate?
whyConsolidate.sub: Four reasons to share the truck, not a dedicated one.

reasons.title: Lower Cost Per Ton
reasons.body: You pay only for the tons you send, not the full truck. Splitting a 34 t truck between three shippers means each pays their share — not the whole thing.

reasons.title: Faster Dispatch
reasons.body: A truck that is already running your route can take your cargo sooner than waiting for a dedicated truck. Less waiting, same corridor.

reasons.title: Full Traceability
reasons.body: Your portion is tracked individually — its own sub-manifest, its own delivery confirmation. You see your data, not the truck's entire load.

reasons.title: Backhaul-Powered Pricing
reasons.body: A truck returning from a delivery carries your cargo back at a fraction of the forward cost. We price the backhaul — you get the savings.

corridors.heading: Where We Operate
corridors.sub: From the Port of Durban to the DRC — we run the corridors that move SADC. Pick your cargo. See where it goes.

items.title: Insurance Compliant
items.body: All consolidated loads carry the same bonded carrier insurance as dedicated trucks. Your cargo is covered whether it fills ten percent of the deck or ninety.

items.title: Tracker & Visibility
items.body: GPS tracking per truck. Your portion of the load is visible in our tracking system — same as a dedicated shipment. Enter your reference on the tracking page to see where your cargo is.

items.title: Proof of Delivery (Coming Soon)
items.body: We are building a system to give each shipper a timestamped, geotagged proof-of-delivery certificate for their portion. Until then, you can request your proof from our dispatch team.

items.question: What is the minimum weight you will consolidate?
items.answer: We will consolidate any weight — no minimum. Even a half-ton pallet can join an existing run. The cost you pay is the weight you send, multiplied by the applicable rate band. If your consignment is tiny, you pay tiny.

items.question: How much longer does a consolidated load take versus a dedicated truck?
items.answer: The truck is already running the route, so dispatch can happen in hours, not days. Transit time depends on the corridor and border complexity — typically the same or faster than a dedicated truck since we avoid waiting for a free vehicle. Consolidation adds no extra time to the journey; it adds efficiency to the pricing.

items.question: What documents do I need to provide per shipment?
items.answer: Origin and destination addresses, cargo description (type, weight, dimensions), and any special handling requirements. We handle the rest — export permits, customs declarations, transit bonds, and border clearance paperwork. You do not need to be a freight document specialist.

items.question: Can I track my portion of the load separately?
items.answer: Yes. Each shipper gets a unique sub-manifest reference. You can track your portion through our tracking system and receive separate delivery confirmation. You see only your data — the truck's full manifest is internal.

items.question: What if my goods need to arrive on an exact date?
items.answer: We can consolidate to delivery date — we batch consignments to meet your deadline. If a consolidated truck cannot guarantee your date, we offer a dedicated truck at the standard rate. You choose the trade-off between price and certainty.
